item.title: When I see things that’ll help my sons, I post them in a shared album. Now I share them with you. If you disagree or feel differently, please move on and don’t bring the rest of us down. Please like if you do.
item.description:
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice this one is getting a lot of comments. Check out my recent Dune meme dump for related work content.
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice

Do it anyway. Be brave.

#ILoveYou
Relationship advice
Warmth
Productivity
Friends. Don’t try to do it all yourself.
Relationship advice
It’s okay. Integrity.
Rest is not a reward.
How to apologize.
Confort zone.
Listen to experience.
Touch grass. Sit in the sun.
Seriously. All the time.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: Utrecht, the Netherlands
item.description: Utrecht, the Netherlands It is being viewed as the **correction of a historic mistake.** More than 40 years after parts of the canal that encircled Utrecht’s old town were concreted over to accommodate a 12-lane motorway, the Dutch city celebrates restoration of its 900-year-old moat.
item.dc:creator: BlakeAndMortimer

item.title: These weren't just "oaks" - they were planted between larch and spruce so that they would grow tall and straight, which means the navy oak forests are rather unusual.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
such interesting creatures
watch out for Trish
don’t we all
looks like Shang Tsung
shame
bears are cool
the 4 tenets
food companies don’t want you to buy this
the struggle is real
mmm hmm
not cool
yes
they can also sleep in jeans
been way too windy here lately
eggs smell
sign guy must be taking a break
that’s all for me, have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Congratulations Jasmin Paris! First woman to ever complete the Barkley Marathons!
item.description:
The Barkley Marathons is an ultramarathon trail race held each year in Frozen Head State Park in Morgan County, Tennessee. The course, which varies from year to year, consists of five loops of the 20+ mile, off-trail course for a total of 100 miles.
Info on the Barkley Marathons: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Barkley_Marathons
Jasmin as she touches the final gate to complete the 5th Loop of the Barkley Marathons, becoming the first woman ever to complete it! She's a Veteran, married Mom of two, and a great inspiration!
Jasmin is seen here competing in 2023, when she failed to finish. Her Blog about that year can be found here on her page on blogspot (Imgur keeps removing this post because for some stupid reason it doesn't want anything linked to there?), but if you go to jasminfellrunner and add the prohibited word behind a dot and a com behind that it gives insight into how incredibly difficult the Barkley Marathons is and shows just how amazing of an accomplishment this is! *Third time trying to post this because it kept getting removed for the offensive website*
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Water you waiting for? Dive into these bottom shelf memes
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Where sometimes we eat the world's hottest chocolate bar and try to read stream "Go The Fuck To Sleep"
Here's some relaxing hot dog photography from our last camping trip.
Ham tax. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: About to get a brain tumor removed (LGG) (4x4x4cm). A bit scared of chance of getting paralyzed or personality changes but let's hope for the best. Enjoy your health, it can happen to anyone as I'm only 24. Fu*ck you and see you tomorrow.
item.dc:creator: Likyyytrexa

item.title: Jasmin Paris. First woman to finish the infamous Barkley Marathon.

item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: I'm proud to say I hit 5 days straight of workouts. I'm just incredibly proud of myself right now!
item.description: Last week I set this goal. I didn't reach it, but this week I was determined. Normally I'd add this to my morning reflection post, but I am just incredibly proud of myself. Also tomorrow is day 60, so that is a milestone. Today I struggled to do a 20 minute leg workout because I'm a big boy. Add to that a 15lb weight. I took extra time in-between sets, but I finally completed it. My legs are shaky and week. Sometimes I struggled to get back up in-between lunges and squats, I got dizzy a bunch of times, but I got back up and finished. I want to send out a special thanks to first my beautiful wife who has chronic pain from her Ehlers Danlos issue. She won't read this post, but her laugh, smile, and beautiful blue eyes helps keep me trying to improve. Secondly, a huge thanks to @emjei for your daily comment on my post and positive messages you leave to help keep me going. You're living your best life in spite of your health challenges help remind me that what I'm feeling while working out is nothing in comparison. Thank online internet friend. Lastly, to everyone else who has taken the time to read my post, given me an upvote, or to those who felt the need to leave a comment, thank you. Looking forward to tomorrow's post!
item.dc:creator: PepperoniAndFingernailPizza

item.title: I messed up.
item.description: I messed up a part and had to redo it. Set me back half a week. He was lucid Wednesday and it would have been done by then I am just needing hinges and a final coat of poly. Mom didn't tell us how bad it got or how quick, I think she was in denial in a way to save herself from grief. She asked me to come by today to choose a hospice. I brought the mostly completed box to show him but he was too delirious to even recognize me. He died this morning while we were holding him. It's for the best, he's not in pain anymore, but I feel like a failure and I feel bad for making it about me. I'm so confused. Thanks for letting me vent.
item.dc:creator: Frostycopper

item.title: At least it's Friday.
item.description: I work in a factory and it's pretty much 80+ degrees inside year round. Dealing with the smell was worth the cool air.
item.dc:creator: WatcherintheShadows
